enhancement_options.label: Artefatos de compressão
enhancement_options.description: Pequenas perdas de qualidade causadas pela compressão da imagem
enhancement_options.prompt: light compression artifacts

enhancement_options.label: Cabelo mais natural
enhancement_options.description: Deixar o cabelo menos perfeito, com algum friz.
enhancement_options.prompt: Hair should not be perfectly styled and should contain some frizz.

enhancement_options.label: Realismo cotidiano
enhancement_options.prompt: everyday realism, ordinary setting, natural imperfections

enhancement_options.label: Foto de celular
enhancement_options.prompt: unplanned handheld smartphone photo, casual snapshot, everyday capture

enhancement_options.label: Motion blur leve
enhancement_options.description: Leve borrão causado por movimento natural da mão ao fotografar
enhancement_options.prompt: slight motion blur from handheld shot

enhancement_options.label: Expressão mais natural
enhancement_options.description: Expressão mais casual, que não pareça ter sido posada
enhancement_options.prompt: candid facial expression, unposed look, expression between poses, relaxed facial muscles, slight asymmetry, natural micro-expressions

enhancement_options.label: Câmera analógica
enhancement_options.prompt: analog photo, film grain, slight color shifts, soft contrast, minor exposure inconsistencies

enhancement_options.label: Roupa levemente amassada
enhancement_options.prompt: slightly wrinkled clothes, natural fabric folds

enhancement_options.label: Enquadramento fora de centro
enhancement_options.prompt: subject off-center, imperfect framing, asymmetrical composition

enhancement_options.label: Sombras irregulares
enhancement_options.description: Sombras com distribuição desigual, sem controle.
enhancement_options.prompt: uneven shadows, inconsistent lighting, no studio lighting

enhancement_options.label: Pouca luz
enhancement_options.prompt: low light conditions, visible noise, shadow grain

enhancement_options.label: Exposição estourada
enhancement_options.description: Áreas claras da imagem com exposição estourada, sem detalhes
enhancement_options.prompt: light spots overexposed, harsh light areas

enhancement_options.label: Ruído digital visível
enhancement_options.description: Granulação típica de câmera de celular, mais perceptível nas sombras.
enhancement_options.prompt: visible digital noise in shadows

enhancement_options.label: Distorção sutil de lente
enhancement_options.description: Bordas levemente deformadas, comuns em lentes de celular.
enhancement_options.prompt: subtle lens distortion on edges

enhancement_options.label: Contraluz errada
enhancement_options.description: Assunto da imagem mais escuro, com fundo claro.
enhancement_options.prompt: backlit subject, subject underexposed, bright background light

enhancement_options.label: White balance incorreto
enhancement_options.description: Temperatura de cor dominante quente ou fria
enhancement_options.prompt: slightly incorrect white balance, warm color cast OR cool color cast

enhancement_options.label: Reflexo de luz indesejado
enhancement_options.prompt: unwanted light reflections, glare spot

enhancement_options.label: Corpo em movimento
enhancement_options.prompt: captured mid-movement, in-between motion, not static pose, motion blur

enhancement_options.label: Fundo levemente bagunçado
enhancement_options.prompt: slightly messy background, natural clutter, unorganized elements

enhancement_options.label: Texturas reais do ambiente
enhancement_options.prompt: uneven surface textures, visible wall imperfections, realistic materials

enhancement_options.label: Iluminação desigual no fundo
enhancement_options.description: Luz não uniforme nos elementos de background
enhancement_options.prompt: uneven background lighting, inconsistent ambient light

enhancement_options.label: Profundidade irregular
enhancement_options.prompt: depth inconsistency, uneven background focus

enhancement_options.label: Ambiente não estilizado
enhancement_options.prompt: non-stylized environment, ordinary setting, no decorative styling

enhancement_options.label: Câmera frontal
enhancement_options.description: Distância curta e close-up no rosto
enhancement_options.prompt: very close-up selfie, front-facing camera, wide-angle distortion, face filling the frame, short shooting distance

enhancement_options.label: Foto tirada no espelho
enhancement_options.prompt: mirror selfie, visible reflection, slight glare on mirror, imperfect framing, light marks of dirt and grease on the mirror

enhancement_options.label: Muito espaço vazio
enhancement_options.prompt: excessive negative space, empty areas, loose framing

enhancement_options.label: Dia nublado
enhancement_options.description: Luz difusa e sem sombras fortes
enhancement_options.prompt: overcast day, soft diffused daylight, flat natural lighting, muted sky, low contrast light

enhancement_options.label: Postura relaxada
enhancement_options.prompt: relaxed posture, casual stance, no posed body language

enhancement_options.label: Costuras e detalhes visíveis
enhancement_options.prompt: visible seams, minor stitching irregularities

enhancement_options.label: Tecido com desgaste sutil
enhancement_options.description: Sinais leves de uso das roupas
enhancement_options.prompt: subtle fabric wear, slightly worn clothing, everyday use texture

enhancement_options.label: Pele com imperfeições
enhancement_options.prompt: natural skin texture, visible pores, subtle skin imperfections, uneven skin tone, no airbrushing, no plastic skin

enhancement_options.label: Pele oleosa
enhancement_options.prompt: Natural oily skin, light skin shine, subtle specular highlights, slight facial sheen, realistic skin reflectivity

enhancement_options.label: Cabelo molhado
enhancement_options.prompt: freshly washed hair, natural clumping, uneven moisture, hair not styled, casual wet hair

enhancement_options.label: Momento espontâneo
enhancement_options.description: Foto capturada no meio da ação, sem preparo prévio.
enhancement_options.prompt: spontaneous moment, captured mid-action, unplanned shot, in-between moments, casual timing, not intentionally framed

enhancement_options.label: Mãos fora do quadro
enhancement_options.prompt: hands partially cropped, incomplete framing

enhancement_options.label: Corpo não-atlético
enhancement_options.description: Proporções naturais de corpos de verdade
enhancement_options.prompt: non-athletic body, average body type

enhancement_options.label: Momento espontâneo (vídeo)
enhancement_options.prompt: spontaneous moment, candid video, unplanned capture

enhancement_options.label: Micro movimentos faciais
enhancement_options.prompt: subtle facial motion, micro-expressions, natural blinking

enhancement_options.label: Variação de luz
enhancement_options.description: Mudanças naturais de iluminação durante a gravação
enhancement_options.prompt: lighting changes mid-shot, exposure shifts, inconsistent brightness

enhancement_options.label: Exposição instável
enhancement_options.description: Ajustes automáticos e tentativa de corrigir a luz
enhancement_options.prompt: auto exposure adjustment, brightness pulsing, some natural exposure fluctuations

enhancement_options.label: Vídeo de celular
enhancement_options.description: Imagem crua e comprimida, de celular
enhancement_options.prompt: smartphone video quality, compressed footage, digital artifacts

enhancement_options.label: Ruído em vídeo
enhancement_options.description: Granulação visível durante a gravação, baixa qualidade
enhancement_options.prompt: video noise, grain in motion, low-light artifacts

enhancement_options.label: FPS irregular
enhancement_options.prompt: inconsistent frame rate, minor frame drops, non-cinematic motion

enhancement_options.label: Sem estética de produção
enhancement_options.prompt: no cinematic lighting, no professional filming, no stylized look

enhancement_options.label: Movimento corporal
enhancement_options.prompt: natural body movement, casual gestures, unplanned motion

enhancement_options.label: Ação interrompida
enhancement_options.description: Movimento que começa e para de repente
enhancement_options.prompt: interrupted action, stop-and-go motion, casual pacing

enhancement_options.label: Começo e fim abruptos
enhancement_options.prompt: abrupt start and end, no fade in or out

enhancement_options.label: Ritmo irregular
enhancement_options.description: Tempo de fala mais natural, sem edição
enhancement_options.prompt: uneven pacing, natural pauses, no jump cuts

enhancement_options.label: Vídeo amador autêntico
enhancement_options.description: Registro que pareça um registro cotidiano real
enhancement_options.prompt: authentic amateur video, everyday realism, not cinematic

enhancement_options.label: Câmera tremida
enhancement_options.prompt: handheld camera shake, slight jitter, imperfect stabilization

enhancement_options.label: Movimentos abruptos
enhancement_options.prompt: sudden camera movements, quick movements

enhancement_options.label: Enquadramento corrigido em tempo real
enhancement_options.prompt: camera reframing mid-shot, small corrections, unplanned adjustments

presets.label: [Foto] Vlog na rua
presets.description: Video casual e despretencioso gravado na cidade
presets.prompt: Person vlogging on a busy urban street, holding smartphone at arm's length in selfie mode. Mid-sentence expression with mouth slightly open, caught between words. Completely unposed casual posture, weight shifted to one side. Wearing everyday clothes - plain t-shirt. Hand gesturing while talking. Imperfect framing - head slightly off-center, cut off at awkward point. Shallow depth of field with blurred pedestrians and cars in background. Harsh daylight, no professional lighting, natural shadows on face. Slight motion blur on hair and gesturing hand. Auto-focus not perfectly sharp. Looks like a paused frame from a real amateur video, not a photoshoot. Smartphone front camera quality, not DSLR. Skin texture visible, no retouching. Wind-blown hair. Authentic street vlog aesthetic, zero production value.

presets.label: [Foto] Selfie no carro
presets.description: Selfie casual, tirada dentro do carro
presets.prompt: Person taking casual selfie inside a car, sitting in driver seat. One arm extended holding phone, low angle from below chin. Playful expression - subtle duck face with shy almost-smile, slightly squinting eyes. Wearing cozy oversized gray hoodie. Messy tousled hair, no styling effort. Natural daylight through windows, harsh uneven lighting on face, some areas slightly overexposed. Car interior visible - headrest, seatbelt, window with blurred background outside. Casual slouched posture against seat. Smartphone front camera quality, slight softness. Authentic candid selfie, Instagram story aesthetic. No makeup, visible skin texture and pores, no retouching. Extended arm visible in frame.

presets.label: [Foto] Stories no escuro
presets.prompt: lying in bed, hand handled angle, paused frame mid-sentence with mouth slightly open. Harsh light illuminating face from above, little overexposed highlights on forehead and nose, visible skin texture - pores, small imperfections, natural skin shine from harsh light. subject off-center, imperfect framing, asymmetrical composition, close-up selfie, front-facing camera, wide-angle distortion, face filling the frame, short shooting distance, low light conditions, visible noise, shadow grain. motion blur. very amateur photo.

presets.label: [Foto] Selfie no elevador
presets.description: Foto despretenciosa tirada no elevador do condomínio
presets.prompt: Casual elevator mirror selfie, person standing slightly off-center, phone covering part of face, visible in reflection. Awkward arm angle holding phone at chest level. Wearing everyday clothes - hoodie or jacket. Unflattering overhead fluorescent lighting casting harsh shadows under eyes and nose. Dirty smudged elevator mirror with visible fingerprints and smears slightly blurring reflection. Cramped small elevator space, metal walls and buttons visible on side. Bad composition - feet cut off, head too close to top edge. Bored tired expression, not smiling, end of day energy. Slight lean against wall, slouched posture. Just elevator doors behind de person. Grainy smartphone camera quality. Visible skin texture, no makeup, messy hair. Happy natural expression. Looks like quick snap sent to friend on WhatsApp, no effort aesthetic. Not very posed, not styled, just documenting existence.

presets.label: [Foto] Vlog caseiro
presets.description: Registro próximo, casual e sem produção
presets.prompt: Person sitting on couch at home recording a vlog, camera on tripod in front of them. Talking directly to camera, mid-sentence with mouth slightly open, caught between words. Both hands gesturing expressively in front of chest. Casual unposed posture, sitting comfortably but not perfectly straight. Wearing everyday clothes - plain gray t-shirt. Living room background with warm lamp light, bookshelf, plants, slightly cluttered lived-in space. Mixed ambient lighting - warm tungsten lamp on one side, natural light from window on other, imperfect uneven lighting on face. Looks like a paused frame from a YouTube video. Slight motion blur on hands from gesturing. Eye contact with camera lens. No makeup or minimal makeup, visible skin texture, no retouching. Natural messy hair. Amateur home vlog aesthetic, not professional studio setup. Webcam or smartphone on tripod quality, not cinematic.

presets.label: [Foto] Foto casual no bar
presets.description: Tirada por terceiro, de forma não planejada
presets.prompt: Candid photo of person sitting at outdoor bar at night, taken by a friend across the table. Not looking at camera, gazing off to the side with relaxed unbothered expression, slight smirk. Holding glass of red wine in one hand, other hand making casual gesture. Wearing black leather jacket. Long messy wavy hair. Sitting in booth or couch seating. Wooden table in foreground with empty wine glass and objects slightly out of focus. Beach bar or rooftop bar atmosphere - white chairs, straw umbrellas, string lights blurred in background. Nighttime ambient lighting - warm tungsten mixed with dim blue night sky, uneven light on face, some shadows. Photo taken mid-moment, not posed, captured between movements. Smartphone flash-off quality, slight grain and noise from low light. Rings and bracelets visible on hands, painted nails. Authentic night out aesthetic, looks like a photo someone would post unedited on Instagram. Shot from across the table angle, slightly below eye level.

presets.label: [Foto] Captura na praia
presets.description: Foto tirada casualmente na praia, de forma espontânea
presets.prompt: Candid beach photo. The person standing in shallow ocean water, waves around knees or thighs. Not looking at camera, caught mid-movement - walking, splashing, or looking at horizon. Natural unposed body position, weight on one leg, arms relaxed or brushing hair from face. Wearing simple swimsuit. Wet hair. Bright harsh midday sunlight, squinting slightly, uneven tan lines visible. Ocean water splashing, droplets caught in motion. Happy expression. Background with other beachgoers, umbrellas and towels in distance. Sandy skin on arms and legs. Smartphone camera quality, slightly washed out colors from bright sun. Authentic vacation photo aesthetic, looks like it belongs in camera roll not Instagram feed. Caught between moments, not waiting for photo.

presets.label: [Vídeo] Vlog caseiro
presets.description: Registro direto com a câmera, sem preparo.
presets.prompt: Amateur home vlog video, person sitting on couch talking directly to camera, telling a story with exciting energy. Continuous fluid movements that flow into each other - never static, never repeating. Leans forward toward camera to emphasize important point then settles back, runs fingers through hair while thinking, looks up or to the side momentarily while remembering something. Quick natural movements with motion blur on hands and hair. Warm living room ambient lighting, cozy but imperfect. 24fps footage. Authentic speech rhythm with natural pauses, not performed. Eyebrows moving expressively. Unscripted genuine energy, like FaceTiming a close friend. Raw footage aesthetic, no editing, no color grading.

presets.label: [Vídeo] Vlog na rua
presets.description: Vlog casual gravado em rua movimentada
presets.prompt: Street vlog selfie, person walking on busy sidewalk holding de video. the video movement follows the person's ritm of walking (camera shaking with steps). Gesturing while talking, glances away to dodge pedestrians then back to camera. Leans de angle closer for emphasis over something. moving background - people, cars, buildings. Auto-exposure shifting between sun and building shadows. Motion blur. Non scripted and no repeated movements. 24fps, Breathless unpolished walking vlog energy. Very amateur video.

presets.label: [Vídeo] Captura casual no bar
presets.description: Vídeo gravado entre amigos em um bar
presets.prompt: Candid handheld video of person at restaurant. The person is never looking at camera. Animated conversation with others off-screen, telling an engaging story. Expressive face constantly changing - eyebrows raising, eyes widening for dramatic effect, genuine surprised expressions. Hand gestures punctuating the story. Never repeat a gesture or a movement. Handheld camera movement - person filming shifts angle, subtle shakes and drifts. 24fps motion blur, quick natural gestures and movements. Authentic dinner party energy, completely unaware of being filmed. Light, exposure and focus of the scenes changes a little during de scene. Raw unedited footage aesthetic. Lots of motion blur. Non scripted camera movements.
